# Wanderlust Travel Agency

> Wanderlust is a professional travel agency offering handcrafted travel experiences to the world's most breathtaking destinations. We specialize in international tour packages, honeymoon travel, safari adventures, and custom itinerary planning.

## Services

- International travel packages
- Honeymoon and luxury travel
- Safari and adventure tourism
- Custom itinerary planning
- 24/7 travel support

## Featured Destinations

- Bali, Indonesia — tropical temples, rice terraces, pristine beaches. From $899
- Santorini, Greece — white-washed buildings, volcanic beaches, stunning sunsets. From $1,199
- Kyoto, Japan — ancient temples, cherry blossoms, traditional culture. From $1,099
- Machu Picchu, Peru — legendary lost city of the Inca Empire. From $1,299
- Amalfi Coast, Italy — clifftop roads overlooking the Mediterranean. From $1,399
- Safari, Kenya — the great migration and the Big Five. From $1,599

## Why Choose Wanderlust

- Global coverage across 80+ countries
- Award winning service for 5 consecutive years
- Best price guarantee
- Safe and secure travel with insurance included
- Tailored experiences for every budget and travel style
- 24/7 emergency support
